name: MindMeister Mind Mapping API
what_it_does: MindMeister online mind mapping REST API for teams and individuals to create, share, and collaborate on visual mind maps with real-time collaboration, presentation mode, and integration with MeisterTask project management. Enables AI agents to manage mind map creation and structure for visual thinking automation, handle node and branch management for idea hierarchy automation, access theme and style configuration for visual presentation automation, retrieve mind map export in PDF, PNG, and document formats for content delivery automation, manage sharing and collaboration permission for team access automation, handle mind map template instantiation for structured brainstorming automation, access revision history for mind map evolution tracking automation, retrieve folder and organization management for mind map portfolio automation, manage public link creation for stakeholder sharing automation, and integrate MindMeister with MeisterTask, Google Drive, Dropbox, and productivity tools for end-to-end visual thinking workflow.
use_cases: Creating structured mind maps from brainstorming automation agents
Organizing ideas visually from concept mapping agents
Generating project plans from visual planning automation agents
Sharing mind maps from collaboration facilitation agents
not_for: Full-featured collaborative whiteboard (use Miro or MURAL for open-ended whiteboarding)
Technical diagramming and flowcharts (use Lucidchart or draw.io)
Project task management (use MeisterTask or Asana for task tracking)
best_when: A team or individual wanting AI agents to automate mind map creation, idea organization, visual presentation, and collaborative brainstorming through MindMeister's online mind mapping platform integrated with MeisterTask.
avoid_when: API ACCESS IS LIMITED VS FULL PLATFORM: MindMeister's REST API provides basic mind map CRUD but not all platform features (presentation mode, real-time collaboration events, advanced export formats) are accessible via API; automated mind map workflows must verify API coverage for required features before committing to API-based mind mapping. MIND MAP DEPTH LIMITS FOR AUTOMATED GENERATION: MindMeister mind maps have practical depth limits for node hierarchy; automated content generation creating deeply nested mind maps (10+ levels) creates rendering performance issues; automated mind map generation should limit hierarchy depth. MEISTERTASK INTEGRATION REQUIRES SEPARATE ACCOUNT: MindMeister-to-MeisterTask task conversion integration requires separate MeisterTask account and active integration connection; automated idea-to-task pipeline spanning MindMeister and MeisterTask must configure both account connections; automated single-platform assumption creates broken workflow at the integration boundary.

auth.notes: MindMeister uses OAuth 2.0 for API access. REST API with JSON. Munich, Germany HQ. Founded 2007 by Till Vollmer and Michael Hollauf. Part of Meister (includes MeisterTask and MeisterNote). Bootstrapped/profitable. Products: Online mind mapping, real-time collaboration, presentation mode, MeisterTask integration. Integrations: MeisterTask, Google Drive, Dropbox, Evernote, Box. GDPR. Serves 25M+ users across education and enterprise. Competes with XMind, Coggle, and Lucidchart for mind mapping.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free plan (3 mind maps, basic features)
pricing.notes: Munich DE. Bootstrapped/profitable. Free tier (3 maps). Per-user subscription. Annual discount.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; mind map and node queries throttled; no webhooks — polling for changes

known_agent_gotchas: NO WEBHOOKS — POLLING REQUIRED FOR COLLABORATION CHANGES: MindMeister does not provide webhooks for mind map change events; automated collaboration monitoring must poll mind map API for changes; automated real-time change detection is not feasible; implement polling interval appropriate for collaboration cadence

NODE ID REGENERATION ON MAP IMPORT: MindMeister assigns new node IDs when mind maps are imported or duplicated; automated workflow maintaining cross-system node ID references must refresh IDs after import or duplication; automated node reference using pre-import IDs creates broken links for valid content

OAUTH TOKEN SCOPE FOR MAP VS FOLDER ACCESS: MindMeister OAuth scopes separate map read, map write, and folder access; automated workflows requiring both map editing and folder organization must request all required scopes; automated scope under-requesting creates permission denied for out-of-scope operations after OAuth grant

EXPORT FORMAT AVAILABILITY BY PLAN: MindMeister export formats (PDF, DOCX, PNG, FreeMind) availability varies by subscription plan; automated export pipeline must verify available export formats for account plan; automated export request for unavailable format on free/basic plan creates plan restriction error

MIND MAP OWNERSHIP TRANSFER FOR TEAM AUTOMATION: MindMeister mind maps are owned by creating user; automated mind map creation using service account creates maps owned by service account; automated team access to service-account-owned maps requires explicit sharing; automated team collaboration maps should create under team account or explicitly share after creation
agent_readiness.security_notes: Mind mapping. GDPR. OAuth2. EU. Mind map content and collaboration data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Mind mapping. GDPR. OAuth2. EU. Mind map and collaboration data.
